hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a single full-range ETH/TOKEN LP position as an ERC4626-style vault, allowing LPs to deposit and borrowers to take ETH loans against TOKEN collateral at 40% LTV. Skims a 0.5% protocol swap fee via beforeSwap/afterSwap delta returns and blocks swaps in the same block as a liquidation.
